name: homepage_0_home

observed_strengths.observation: Active 40% Off Cologne Sets promo banner sitewide — discount mechanism in place driving high-intent category
Broad product catalog: beard oil, balm, softener, wash, cologne, deodorant, styling paste, sea salt spray, tools, trimmer — lifestyle ecosystem fully represented in navigation
Community CTA 'Join Our Community' (Alliance Membership) on homepage — retention mechanism prominently positioned
'Grow Your Mind' blog section on homepage — content-driven engagement loop visible

missing_or_weak.observation: H1 is just 'Beardbrand' — no value proposition, benefit, or category differentiation in the primary heading
No social proof visible in page structure (no review count, star rating, or customer testimonial headings on homepage)
CTA text is generic 'Shop' and 'Shop All' — no benefit-led or category-specific CTA above fold

purchase_path_notes: Homepage navigates to collections and products. Alliance Membership and Book of Reminders visible in nav — non-standard products featured alongside grooming goods. 40% off promo creates urgency at entry.
